'''OS-72-10''' was a [[TIE pilot]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who had at certain points served aboard<ref name="OScard" /> the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]<ref name="CSWE Conquest">{{CSWECite|I|138|''Conquest''}}</ref><ref name="CSWE Thunderflare">{{CSWECite|III|242|''Thunderflare''}}</ref> [[Conquest (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Conquest'']] and ''[[Thunderflare]]'', as well as<ref name="OScard" /> the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]]<ref name="CSWE Executor">{{CSWECite|I|245|''Executor''}}</ref> [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].<ref name="OScard" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">The ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] is set around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> OS-72-10 had joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Obsidian Squadron/Legends|Obsidian Squadron]], flying under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] of [[Obsidian 10]].<ref name="OScard" />

By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC" /> Obsidian 10, stationed aboard the ''Thunderflare'', was recalled to defend the Empire's [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] during its construction<ref name="Obsidian10card">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Obsidian 10}}</ref> in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]].<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> OS-72-10 wore the standard [[Imperial military uniforms/Legends|uniform]] for [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. He also had no interest in advancing in [[Military rank/Legends|rank]], as it would remove him from the pilot's seat.<ref name="OScard" />

==Behind the scenes==
OS-72-10 was first pictured in [[1996]]'s ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]'', a roleplaying supplement for [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]].<ref name="SETSB">''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]''</ref> He was named in the ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], released in [[1998]].<ref name="OScard" />
